_purpose: Machine-readable Task 0 verification results (spec Revision 2). Counterpart to the human-readable docs/versature-task-0-verification.md. Used as the regression-guard baseline for monthly CI runs of inspect-queue-shape.mjs.
executor: automated agent (subagent under Claude Code SDK)

shape._note: Apr 16 worked; Apr 30 initially errored on limit=1000 (API max is exclusive of 1000); the inspect script was patched in this commit to use limit=999 + pagination. Both dates now pass.

queueTouch.verdict: Gate 2 fails as the design feared possible. CDR to.user is the segment's terminal destination, not its queue traversal. Per the spec failure decision, the design has been redesigned (Revision 2): queue buckets now source from raw_queue_stats. This file's per-queue numbers serve as the regression-guard baseline. Drift from these numbers in monthly CI runs triggers an investigation but does NOT block builds.

splitsRate.decision: raise queue_splits.perMinute from 12 to 24 in lib/versature/rate-limiter.ts

callIdUniqueness._note: from_call_id PK in lib/warehouse/schema.sql.logical_calls is retained.

dnisCoverage._note: 7 unexpected NULLs were international/star-code patterns added to dnis-allowed-exceptions.json. Normalizer logic unchanged (correct behaviour: these are not NANP numbers).

tieBreak._note: No tied start_time observed. Stage 4 SQL no longer has a first_tracked CTE under Revision 2, so the secondary sort is not exercised anyway.

designChangesTriggered: spec Revision 2: kpi_snapshots queue buckets sourced from raw_queue_stats
spec Revision 2: logical_calls drops touched_queues, first_tracked_queue, touched_ai, is_english, is_french, is_ai, is_ai_overflow
spec Revision 2: ai_overflow_calls = ai_calls (AI queues are overflow-only by tenant policy)
spec Revision 2: Gate 2 reframed as monthly regression guard
tests/fixtures/dnis-allowed-exceptions.json: extended with international and star-code patterns
scripts/inspect-cdr-shape.mjs: paginated; uses /cdrs/ instead of /cdrs/users/; limit 999 (API max is exclusive of 1000)
outOfScope: 8007: appeared 25 times as to.user but is not a configured tracked queue. Treated as unknown / not tracked. If Versature/admin confirms it's a business queue, add as a configured queue with a named role.
